description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical metal bollard painted in a weathered red color, featuring a large circular ring welded horizontally around its midsection. The surface is marked with patches of chipped paint and visible wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor use and exposure to the elements. The bollard stands on a wide, flat circular base, likely designed for stability and to be bolted to the ground. The central post is solid and thick, providing a strong visual and physical barrier. The circular ring is seamlessly attached to the main post, forming a distinctive and functional design that can deter vehicle access while allowing pedestrian flow. The overall construction and finish indicate it is intended for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots.
description: A sturdy red metal bollard with a large circular ring around its center and a wide, flat base, showing signs of weathering and chipped paint.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular ring attached to the central post and the wide, flat base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical post with the ring edge-on, making the ring appear as a thin line.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the circular ring and base, with visible wear on the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the post and the ring edge-on, highlighting the thickness of the central cylinder.
